title: Cytotechnologist
description: We're hiring a Cytotechnologist at Medtronic. This is an exciting opportunity to join our patient-impact, innovation-driven, global team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 0-1 years years of experience and are passionate about Medical Devices, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Prepare and examine microscopic cell samples for pathological abnormalities
Operate laboratory equipment and quality control testing
Document findings and maintain accurate laboratory records
Follow established protocols to ensure specimen integrity and accuracy
Identify abnormal cells and communicate findings to pathologists
Participate in continuing education to stay current with diagnostic advances
